title: Company Announcers, Distribution, and other misc changes

body.text: Taking a bit of a break from the internal rework and made some feature changes instead.

texts: Announcers have been added to Company.

Changed the default alignment of text from Justified to Left-aligned to prevent awkward spacing in narrow texts (e.g. sinner notes in Builds). Also changed how statuses are displayed so they wrap better in said texts.
Fixed Advanced Filter/Sort options causing crashes in the selection menus and white/black lists in Team Randomizer, Team Solver, Team Draft, and Dispense and Training Calculator
Added better support for announcers in the Extraction Simulator and added their names to the icon displayed.
Added support for timers for permanent events.
Redesigned the Keyword/Sin Distribution panel below Builds and MD Plans. Also redesigned the layout of the panels, especially on mobile.
Fixed Team Draft crashing when no more choices are available. Instead it now skips to the finished state.

Changed Team Draft's choice generation behavior for cases where the remaining identities are not enough to populate the number of choices for the round. Previously identities that have appeared in a previous round couldn't appear again until all remaining identities have appeared causing some rounds to have less choices than what was set. Now identities that have appeared in a previous round can appear again if there are not enough to populate the required number of choices for that round.
Fixed <Lake Entity> not showing up and Pierce Power Up not being linked in Captain Ishmael's passive.
